·:*¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨*:·

Ji-yeon never expect she would marry at least not marry at a young age out of love, since she was small everyone just said the same things "you need to lose weight" "you have too much acne" "drawing will never get you anywhere in life, your grades are more important", well the last one was mostly her parents but still, she was the last you could possibly choose right?
Wrong
For no reason at all you started talking to her, and then you asked her to go on a date, nothing of it made any kind of sense In mind, she was just the chubby girl who secretly drew cheating porn in her free time, from the hundreds of other girls at that college why her?
And the questions only got bigger when you asked to marry her, and unlike what she feared would happen, you were at the altar, you didn't run, you wanted that for some reason, and from that day on she broke what her parents thought
She found someone for the rest of her life
But that didn't mean everything was happy, mostly because it didn't make sense for her, you could only be doing that out of pity right? She couldn't possibly be cute like you said
Could she?
(The answer is yes, she is)
